feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Mobile Start
feed.subtitle: SAP Mobile Start Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot access tiles on Launchpad & Mobile ( SAP Mobile Start )
entry.content:
Hi all,

Please advice, how to solving this?
I cannot accessing tiles on rule SAP_BR_PURCHASER.
But when click tiles, always loading never ending and until timeout.

 

Regards,

entry.title: How to call standard Fiori application in Mobile application through link in an email ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to call standard Fiori application in Mobile application through link in an email.

Suppose based on some workflow configurations, you will get an email for sales order details.

Example : Sales order no : 1234

and some URL Link to open the relevant order in Standard Fiori application.

Generally, sap standard fiori apps are browser based URL.

Here the requirement is once they click on the link they want to see that sales order in mobile application not in the browser.

Earlier SAP Fiori client has one application was there, now its no longer available.

Now we have seen SAP Mobile Start 

Is it possible, to open that sales order directly in mobile application instead of browser ?

Thanks,

entry.title: sap mobile start - how to create a tile to launch custom app developed using mdk in sap bas?
entry.content:
I have followed few developer tutorials:

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-level-up.html

Following above tutorials I created many mdk apps with systems SampleServiceV4 & swagger_petstore

I googled a lot but surprisingly I did not see any blog explaining creating tile selecting 'system' for sap mobile start

this below blog has shown creating tile selecting "no system"

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-mobile-start-adding-native-apps-to-your-content/ba-p/13515218

providing additional details below:

bas project folder with apps developed using mdk:

destination:

mobile services native/mdk:

project.json of app

launchpad is sap mobile start enabled.

app configuration (content manager / demo), system available for selection:

 

what should be correct selection for 'app ui technology' ?

if i select sap ui5, it asks for component id. what should i provide in component id?

if i select 'dynamic url' , what should be the url?

 

Please help in this regard.

@dennis_koehler 

@SAPSupport

entry.title: Restrict few SAP Fiori Notification to SAP Workzone and Mobile Devices
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have configured multiple notifications in the SAP S/4 system. This included configuring the standard notification as well as custom notification.

I have also integrated the SAP Workzone notification with the SAP Fiori Launchpad notification and configured the SAP Mobile Start to get the notification on mobile devices.

My question is how we can restrict some notifications to Fiori launchpad only and not pass that notification to SAP Workzone or mobile devices. 

Is there any way which is provided by the SAP Notification framework by which we can do this so that my sensitive notification can only be on Fiori launchpad and not move to Workzone or mobile devices?

entry.title: Modification of standard SAP Notification
entry.content:
I have activated some of the standard notifications for workflow and purchase orders.

But I have a requirement that the notification text should be changed, and we have to disable some action buttons and have to introduce a new action button. Is there any way in the extended framework for notification by which we can enhance the standard notification?

If we have to restrict certain notifications to only get triggered for some type of business document or some purchase organization, how can we achieve this?

entry.title: Caused by: EvalError: Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an all
entry.content: hi, I'm used QR code library in SAP my UI5 application.. it's worked for locally & deploy but in SAP Work Zone  i created tile for this application...it is not working ....getting error  like this "Caused by: EvalError: Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:".  plz anyone help help me.

entry.title: implement a custom application that can scan QR codes using SAP mobile start
entry.content:
Hi all,

In the Business Application Studio, I want to implement a custom sapui5 application that can scan QR codes with my mobile phone using SAP Mobile start. The application should be integrated into the Fiori Launchpad and work for both iOS and Android. It is important that not only simple barcodes are supported - QR codes are mandatory for my purposes. I would appreciate helpful links, instructions or step-by-step guides...

 

Thanks....

entry.title: Custom Shell plugin in Mobile start not visible
entry.content:
I have developed a simple shell plugin to open an app using semantic/action. Its is visible in WZ standard edition Desktop browser and works as expected, but not in mobile device. is it limitation or do I miss any configuration ?

 
Component.js
 
 oRenderer.addHeaderEndItem({
                        icon: "sap-icon://manager",
                        tooltip: "My Substitutes",
                        target: "#ZMANAGE-create"
                    }, true, false);
Manifest
  "hideLauncher": true,
  "semanticObject": "Shell",
  "action": "plugin"
....
"sap.flp": {
    "type": "plugin"
  },
.....
 "deviceTypes": {
      "desktop": true,
      "tablet": true,
      "phone": true
    }
 
Desktop:

 Mobile Device (Mobile Start app)

Any pointers would help

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: Enable SAP IAG on SAP mobile start application
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can we enable SAP IAG in the SAP Mobile Start application?

Could someone please assist with the process or provide any relevant documentation?

Thanks

Prameel

entry.title: Speech To Text in SAP Mobile Start on iOS
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm working on an CAP & SAPUI5 APP which leverages Speech Recognition. To reduce the dependence on fast internet, we decided to use the built-in speech to text functions.

To achieve Support across all Browsers we use either webkitSpeechRecognition or SpeechRecoginition depending on which is available. This appears to be working fine on Chrome, Edge and Safari(even Mobile) and on SAP Mobile Start for Android

      onSpeechRecognition() {
        let oSpeechRecognition;
        if ('SpeechRecognition' in window || 'webkitSpeechRecognition' in window) {
          oSpeechRecognition = new webkitSpeechRecognition() || new SpeechRecognition();
        } else {
          MessageBox.error('SpeechRecognition is not supported on this Device');
        }
        this.setControls('isRecording', true);

        oSpeechRecognition.continuous = true;
        oSpeechRecognition.lang = navigator.language || 'ch-DE';

        oSpeechRecognition.onresult = function (oSpeechResult) {
          let sInput = '';
          for (let oResult of oSpeechResult.results) {
            sInput += oResult[0].transcript;
          }
          this.byId('message').setValue(sInput);
        }.bind(this);
        oSpeechRecognition.start();
        this.stt = oSpeechRecognition;
      },

But when opening the same App in Mobile Start for iOS, the SpeechRecognition doesn't work. The prompt for asking for Microphone permissions isn't even shown.

This surprises me especially since the Blog about Mobile Start from @ThiloBerndt mentions Speech-To-Text explicitly.

Any help and advice would be appreciated.

Best regards, Michael

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start - Deactivate button
entry.content:
Hi,

We use SAP Mobile Start in combination with SAP BTP Build Work Zone. We are also using the notifications within SAP Mobile Start.

So if a new item arrives, the end user will receive a notification in SAP Mobile Start. They then click on the notification and see a so called "first screen". There is a reject (afwijzen) button on this first screen as you can see in de picture.

Does anyone know how I could deactivate this button? It should not be visible to the end user.

Best regards,

Gene

entry.title: How to view custom apps created in s/4hana cloud at work zone.
entry.content:
Hi. I need your help.

I have subscried and set up the work zone(standard, free version) on BTP to use mobile start.

And I have integrated s/4hana cloud and work zone.

In the same space as s/4hana cloud launchpad, I can see the original apps, but I can't see the all custom apps(created with custom bo, custom query, etc.)

How can I see the custom apps?

entry.title: Taskcenter does not receive S4 task notifications
entry.content:
Hello team !

We are having the following issue, we have integrated S/4HANA with SAP Task Center + Mobile Start, everything work as expected but, in the Task Center the Notifications of new tasks are not being displayed in the bell in the page header.

User notifications for taskcenter tasks are not being displayed. When a Purchase Order Approval workflow task is sent to users, the notification is not presented in the workzone. 

The notification is working normally through Fiori's Myinbox.

Only in the workzone that is not working properly. 

The following configurations were made as described in the manual below:

Receiving SAP S/4HANA Workflow Notifications
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/Setting-Up-SAP-Build-Work-Zone-standard-edition-and-SAP-Mobile-Start-with-SAP-S-4HANA/explaining-the-setup-for-sap-s-4hana

Enabling Notifications From SAP S/4HANA
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/enabling-notifications-from-sap-s-4hana?locale=en-US

Enable Notifications for End Users
https://help.sap.com/docs/task-center/sap-task-center/enable-notifications-for-end-users

When performing a test of sending a notification through the transaction /n/IWNGW/BEP_DEMO it is displayed in the Fiori myinbox correctly, but it is not displayed in the workzone. 

When accessing the /N/IWFND/ERROR_LOG log, the following message is presented: "The remote service triggered a client error '400': 'Bad Request'"

Any tip is valid, thank you !!!

entry.title: Mobile Start - How to Display PO Information on the Task Card
entry.content:
Hello Team !

I would like to know what procedure to be carried out so that the purchase order release tasks present the information of the items and total value of the order.

To represent my question, please see the attached file, which presents the current mobile start screen and a screen that I took from the mobile start documentation.

any tip is valid, thank you !!

entry.title: Error Importing content in SAP Build Work Zone - SAP Mobile Start with SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I’m setting up SAP Mobile Start with SAP S/4HANA Cloud in SAP Build Work Zone.
Tutorial: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/Setting-Up-SAP-Build-Work-Zone-standard-edition-and-SAP-Mobile-Start-with-SAP-S-4HANA

The problem is that when I import content into SAP Build Work Zone, it doesn’t bring any components.

When I check in SAP S/4HANA Cloud using the “Display Launchpad Content Exposure Logs” app, I see the scenario is called correctly.

Here is how I have the content provider configured:

This is how I have the destinations set up in BTP:
Design-time destination

Runtime tiles

Runtime apps

This is the SAP S/4HANA Cloud role exposed in BTP.

Does anyone have an idea where the error might be or what configuration point I should check?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Camera Access issue for Intune-Distributed users on iOS devices for SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hi

We have an issue whereby users cannot gain access to the camera when they are onboarded on to SAP Mobile Start via Intune. In this case the video button in the top navigation bar displays in red, and the camera feature is unavailable - because the Intune-released users on iOS devices have not granted explicit permission to the camera. When users are onboarded via the QR code there is a specific pop up which requests access to the Camera so the issue is only raised via the Intune onboarding process. 

Looking for some assistance with the following points:

  1. Verify if there are any specific settings or configuration adjustments required for Intune-released users who have not completed the QR code-based onboarding process.
  2. Provide guidance on how to enable camera access for these users or any steps they need to follow for granting camera permissions on their iOS devices.
  3. If there are any system-wide configurations in SAP Mobile Services that need to be adjusted for these users, please advise on the best approach.
  4. Confirm if there in any feature flag I can enable to access the camera for users who have not given permission.

Any assistance would be appreciated.

Kind Regards

Phil Cooley

entry.title: Issue with User Creation for SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently facing an issue with the SAP Mobile Start application related to user creation through the Business Technology Platform (BTP). When we create a user via BTP, there seems to be no verification method in place, and therefore users cannot proceed with the process. As a result, if the user is not already an SAP user and is utilizing services like Gmail or Hotmail, they are required to create an SAP Universal ID.

I’m seeking advice on whether there is a solution or a proper approach to handle this situation. Is it mandatory for each employee to create their own SAP Universal ID, or is there an alternative method to simplify this process? For example, when I add an email to BTP, something like sending a link directly to the user's email address to create their account with a password.

Any insights or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Activation of SAP Mobile Start Application on SAP BTP Neo
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

Is there anyway to activate Mobile application 'SAP Mobile Start' using SAP BTP Neo Cockpit?
How to get SAP BTP Cloud Foundry access ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Dear All

I have activated SAP Start using booster and SAP Build Foundation Edition.

Destinations are also created and Roles are exposed to BTP but over SAP Build Site, No App is showing neither roles are appearing in Content Exposure Channel.

Any idea , how to enable Tiles over SAP Start.

entry.title: Facing issues with adding SVG format files in SAP MDK 24.11
entry.content:
Hi all,

I was working on a task to put the SAP Logo at the left side on the top action bar in our team's mobile app. I was trying to use put an SAP Logo in SVG format so as to not compromise on pixel quality as well as make the most out of MDK 24.11's updates. However, when I used the attached SVG file below in our app, it doesn't show up appropriately in the app as you guys can see in the screenshot. Can anyone help me out in this?


{
	"Caption": "Dashboard Test",
	"PrefersLargeCaption": true,
	"Controls": [
		{
			"_Name": "SectionedDashboardTable",
			"_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "Target": "/Rex/Rules/Dashboard/TargetForDashboard.js",
            "Section": "/Rex/Rules/Dashboard/GetDashboardSection.js"
		}
	],
	"ActionBar": {
		"Logo": "/Rex/Images/SAP-Logo.svg",
    	"Items": [

			{
			"_Name": "ProfileR",
			"Icon": "/Rex/Rules/GetProfilePicture.js",
			"IconText": "",
			"Position": "Right",
			"IsIconCircular": true,
			  "OnPress": {
				"Name": "/Rex/Actions/CommonNavTo.action",
				"Properties": {
						"PageToOpen": "/Rex/Pages/Profile.page",
						"ModalPage": true
						}
			}
		}
		],
		"_Name": "dashboardActionItems",
		"_Type": "Control.Type.ActionBar"
  	},
	"_Name": "Dashboard",
	"OnResume": "/Rex/Rules/Details/RedrawPageIfRequired.js",
	"OnReturning": "/Rex/Rules/Details/RedrawPageIfRequired.js",
	"OnCustomEventDataReceived":"/Rex/Rules/Details/RedrawPageIfRequired.js",
	"_Type": "Page",
	"PullDown": {
		"OnPulledDown": "/Rex/Actions/Service/SyncStartedMessage.action"
	}
}
